monthly_themes.January: Pray they will honour, love and obey the Father, continually seeking his face
monthly_themes.February: Pray they will rely upon and treasure Christ above all, and live out their union with him
monthly_themes.March: Pray they would be filled with the Spirit and sensitive to his leading
monthly_themes.April: Pray they would be overflowing in self-giving love for their brothers and sisters
monthly_themes.May: Pray they would be intentional in disciple-making inside and outside the church
monthly_themes.June: Pray they would be rooted in the word and feeding on it daily
monthly_themes.July: Pray they would be open with others, confessing sins and sharing struggles
monthly_themes.August: Pray they would carry out the good works God prepared for them to do
monthly_themes.September: Pray they would use the gifts of the Spirit to serve and bless the church
monthly_themes.October: Pray they would grow in wisdom from above to navigate life well
monthly_themes.November: Pray that they would be deeply and expectantly prayerful
monthly_themes.December: Pray they would fix their eyes firmly on the future and invest all in God's kingdom
